summary: Full test of all new features: werkbon delete, duplicate, weekly stats/filter, Bewerken/Kopiëren buttons, and klant BTW nummer. All backend tests (10/10) passed and all frontend UI features verified visually and functionally.
action_items: Consider using EXPO_BACKEND_URL (per playbook) instead of EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in appStore.ts - currently works but violates naming convention.
Authorization is frontend-controlled: /api/werkbonnen has no role/auth check on the backend - workers can access all werkbonnen via direct API call (pre-existing issue from iteration 3).
critical_code_review_comments: appStore.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (line 4), not EXPO_BACKEND_URL as required by the playbook - both variables exist in frontend/.env pointing to same URL so it works but is inconsistent.
Email routing confirmed: all werkbon emails route to company admin (info@smart-techbv.be) due to Resend domain verification requirement - this is expected/documented behavior.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 feature checks passed: login, delete btn, weekly stats, week filter chips, Bewerken btn, Kopiëren btn, BTW nummer field)

seed_data_creation: Test klant, werf, and werkbonnen created and cleaned up during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new features verified. Admin login: info@smart-techbv.be / smart123. Werkbon list has 18 items visible. Weekly stats show current week (week 10 of 2026) with 0 werkbonnen and 18 total. Week filter chips: Alle, Week 47, Week 22, Week 21. Each werkbon card has a red trash delete button. Concept werkbons in detail view show Bewerken + Ondertekenen + Kopiëren + PDF Preview buttons. Klant edit modal has BTW Nummer (optioneel) field with placeholder 'Bijv. BE0123456789'.
